'''Adol Bel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as the director of [[Xucphra Corporation]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
When many criminals of the exterior edge merged with a commercial combine under the leadership of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Iaco Stark/Legends|Iaco Stark]], the Corporation went under Xucphra Adol Bel's [[Stark Commercial Combine]]. Bel faked an explosion of its processing plants and staged in an apparent [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] shortage. By pretending that the production of the drug has decreased by two-thirds, and then the price rose rapidly, he drove himself a substantial profit. The Viceroy of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Hask]] was privy to Adol Bel's plans. This led to the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]].

During the war, Adol Bel later found his displeasure with Iaco Stark when he released a [[navcomputer virus]] that all vessels prevented access to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] routes. Bel was not able to extradite its tons of excess bacta.
